title: LotteryCrates
description: A fun crate system, which includes a "lottery" way of opening them
body:
LotteryCrates - Custom Ticket Reward System with Interactive Spin Animation
LotteryCrates is an easy-to-configure, highly customizable Minecraft plugin that adds a unique ticket-based reward system to your server. Players can obtain various tickets, each offering distinct prize pools with different rarities and chances.

Key Features:
Multiple ticket types with configurable names, materials, and prize lists

Weighted prize chances to balance rarity and excitement

Interactive spin animation GUI simulating a crate opening — just like popular FPS games!
Informative tooltips showing possible prizes right on the ticket items

Smooth, customizable rolling animation with gradual slow down

Automatic inventory handling — prizes are safely added or dropped if inventory is full

Easy to extend with config-based ticket and prize definitions

Friendly player messages and cancel option in roll menu
Why use LotteryCrates?
Bring the thrill of lottery-style loot crate openings to your Minecraft server! Whether you want to reward players, encourage participation, or add fun progression mechanics, this plugin offers a visually engaging and configurable solution.
